label: Junior SWE to Senior SWE
story: This hire knows frontend JavaScript but lacks production backend and systems depth. The path should skip basics they already know and focus on production-readiness gaps.
resume_text: Candidate has recent experience with Python, HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Git and some SQL. They also have older exposure to OOP. Built frontend features using JavaScript and HTML/CSS, collaborated with Git, and wrote small Python utilities. Skills: Python, HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Git, SQL, OOP.
jd_text: Senior SWE role. Required skills: System Design, Docker, CI/CD, Microservices, Testing, TypeScript. Preferred skills: GraphQL, Caching (Redis), Cloud Basics.

label: Junior Data Analyst to ML Engineer
story: This candidate can query and analyze data but has never built production ML systems. The path should preserve their SQL and Pandas strength while building the ML chain upward.
resume_text: Candidate has recent experience with SQL, Pandas and Python. They also have some older data visualization work. Built dashboards, queried warehouse tables, and cleaned data in Pandas. Skills: SQL, Pandas, Python, Data Visualization.
jd_text: ML Engineer role. Required skills: Machine Learning Fundamentals, Deep Learning, Feature Engineering, MLOps, Model Deployment, NumPy. Preferred skills: NLP, Vector Databases, LLMs.
